title: alchemilla vulgaris subsp. mairei
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris subsp. mairei, commonly known as the lady's mantle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the buckwheat family, Polygonaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of alchemilla vulgaris subsp. mairei include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and promote wound healing. Alchemilla vulgaris subsp. mairei is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
